source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Refined geometric/humanist English product UI with Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body text, labels, numerals, navigation, dashboard metrics, and compact Japanese interior workflows.
layout: Precise 8px product grids, 8px radii, split-leaf shadow texture accents, restrained modern-interior panels, dense dashboard tables, command/search surfaces, and calm tropical-understory contrast.

prompts.label: Transparent Monstera leaf motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a single monstera leaf, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: One mature Monstera deliciosa leaf with accurate botanical split-leaf form, deep emerald green surface, natural fenestrations and lobed edges, visible central vein and secondary veins, subtle tropical understory shadow gradients, waxy botanical texture, short stem attached. The leaf should be opaque and cleanly separated from the background.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the leaf or stem.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves natural deep green leaf color, vein relief, and material detail, with no cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no pot, no soil, no branch, no extra leaves, no landscape, no decorative background, no second subject, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Monstera light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Monstera", derived from a single mature Monstera deliciosa split leaf motif. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible modern interior system.
Reference motif: deep emerald Monstera leaf, split lobed edges, fenestrations, waxy botanical texture, central vein, lime vein highlights, tropical understory shadow, modern interior calm.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, target 3840 x 2160, high-resolution source asset, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid.
Required visible sections: Morphous Monstera, Monstera Leaf, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: use only motif-derived colors: deep split-leaf green, darker understory shadow green, vein lime, desaturated sage, pale leaf underside neutral, humid mist neutral, charcoal leaf shadow, and warm modern-interior off-white derived from leaf highlights.
Typography: English product UI guidance with Japanese typography guidance; use a refined geometric/humanist Latin sans and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, numerals, navigation, dashboard metrics, and dense facility/interior tables. Include short Japanese labels such as 検索, 状態, 空間, 承認, 更新.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, occupancy/data chart, foliage-toned bar chart, room status table, project table, command palette, global search, filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple lucide-style icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, compact and comfortable density notes.
Style: premium modern interior product design system, airy off-white surfaces, deep green primary actions, sage secondary controls, lime-vein focus rings, tropical-understory neutral surfaces, crisp panels, subtle split-leaf shadow texture, restrained shadows, exact 8px card radius, no rounded pill excess.
Text: short readable UI labels only, no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no stock photos, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Monstera", no tiny illegible paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Monstera dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Monstera". It must feel like the same modern interior system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the Monstera leaf motif.
Reference motif: mature deep emerald Monstera deliciosa split leaf with lobed edges, fenestrations, waxy botanical texture, lime central vein, sage underside, tropical understory shadow.
Reference light-board system details to preserve: deep leaf green primary controls, sage secondary controls, lime-vein focus rings, off-white interior surfaces, mist neutral muted surfaces, shadow-green structure, precise dashboard/data/forms/tables/search/status/token coverage, English and Japanese typography guidance, exact 8px radius.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, target 3840 x 2160, high-resolution source asset, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid.
Required visible sections: Morphous Monstera, Dark Mode, Monstera Leaf, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: use only motif-derived colors: deep split-leaf green, almost-black understory green, charcoal leaf shadow, sage muted green, lime vein, pale underside neutral, mist gray green, and warm interior highlight neutral derived from leaf highlights.
Typography: English product UI guidance with Japanese typography guidance; use a refined geometric/humanist Latin sans and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, numerals, navigation, dashboard metrics, and dense facility/interior tables. Include short Japanese labels such as 検索, 状態, 空間, 承認, 更新.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, occupancy/data line chart, foliage-toned bar chart, room status table, project table, command palette, global search, filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple lucide-style icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, compact and comfortable density notes.
Visual details: dark background derived from deepest understory leaf shadow, elevated panels in dark green charcoal, pale leaf underside foreground text, sage muted labels, deep green primary actions, lime-vein focus rings, subtle split-leaf shadow texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, restrained shadows, no neon.
Text: short readable UI labels only, no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no pure flat black background, no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Monstera", no tiny illegible paragraphs.
